'''''Doyle''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] used by [[Habeen]] researchers at the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Mylok IV Conflict]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Shuttle ''Doyle'' docked with Habeen containers at their deep-space research facility, rescuing critical [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology from an attack by [[Nharwaak]] dissidents.<ref name="TIE" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
